title: Events
description: Upcoming events with date badges, location and detail pages; managed through an admin grid.
_comment: CMS-in-CMS template: an Events app in four pages. PUBLIC: /events lists upcoming events as cards (date badge, location, teaser) and /events/{record_id} renders the full event page. ADMIN (CMS surface): /cms/events is an entry-table CRUD grid and /cms/events/form is one create+edit form page with two routes (blank = create, /{record_id} = update) opened as a modal. Data binding is portable via "@section:events-form" tokens; data_tables[] carries columns + sample rows (import with options.importData=true). The description input is translatable. Content locales: de-CH + en-GB. Use a keyword + route prefix to import a second copy — in-content links are rewritten automatically. Import via Admin > Pages > Import. NOT auto-seeded.

description.en-GB: A one-hour introduction for new participants: how the study works, how to use the app, and how your data is protected. Includes a live Q&A with the study team.
description.de-CH: Eine einstündige Einführung für neue Teilnehmende: Ablauf der Studie, Nutzung der App und Schutz Ihrer Daten. Mit Live-Q&A des Studienteams.

description.en-GB: Hands-on training for study coordinators: building pages with the CMS, importing templates, and managing participant groups. Bring your own laptop.
description.de-CH: Praxisworkshop für Studienkoordinatorinnen: Seiten im CMS erstellen, Vorlagen importieren und Teilnehmergruppen verwalten. Bitte eigenen Laptop mitbringen.

description.en-GB: Visit the lab, meet the researchers and see the measurement setup used in the current wave. Open to all enrolled participants and their families.
description.de-CH: Besuchen Sie das Labor, lernen Sie die Forschenden kennen und sehen Sie den Messaufbau der aktuellen Welle. Offen für alle eingeschriebenen Teilnehmenden und ihre Familien.

description.en-GB: We present the first aggregated results of the study, what they mean, and what happens next. With apéro afterwards.
description.de-CH: Wir präsentieren die ersten aggregierten Studienergebnisse, was sie bedeuten und wie es weitergeht. Anschliessend Apéro.

en-GB.content: Translatable — enter a separate text per language.

de-CH.content: Webinare, Workshops und Treffen rund um die Studie.

en-GB.content: Webinars, workshops and meetups around the study.

de-CH.content: Noch keine Veranstaltungen — mit «Neu hinzufügen» die erste anlegen.

en-GB.content: No events yet — click "Add new" to create the first one.
